case_title: BANK OF THE WEST VS. BERBERYAN GEVORK et al

docket_entries.description: REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $374.30 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 AS TO DEFENDANT GEVORK, BERBERYAN INDIVIDUALLY AND DBA GMS TRUCKLINE

DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 THRU 10, INCL.

CAUSE CALLED, THE COURT ORDERED THAT PLAINTIFF BANK OF THE WEST HAVE AND RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GEVORK, BERBERYAN INDIVIDUALLY AND DBA GMS TRUCKLINE POSSESSION OF THE FOLLOWING DESCRIBED PROPERTY, TO WIT: ONE FREIGHTLINER D120042ST, VIN#1FUWDZYAXXPB00393; SEE JUDGMENT AT LENGHT, OR IN CASE A DELIVERY OF SAID PROPERTY TO PLAINTIFF CANNOT BE HAD, THEN THAT THE PLAINTIFF HAVE AND RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT $20,299.44 DAMAGES, $2,375.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $374.30 COSTS, $739.48 INTEREST, TOTAL JUDGMENT $23,788.22, PROPERTY MARKET VALUE OF $8,000.00 SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
